chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA No. 211 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of Case 1. For hearing of CMA No.248/2018 2. For hearing of Main Case 06.02.2026 Mr. Faheem Ali Memon Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Muhammad Inzimam Shareef Advocate files power on behalf of the Respondent and seeks time. At his request adjourned. Judge Judge Amjad PS
